name: openai.chat.completions.create
description: Cross-cutting: customer-supplied metadata via `with_gravel_metadata({...})` (Python) / `gravelMetadata({...})` (TS). Renderer separates USER metadata from SDK-provided keys: user keys (here `tenant_id`, `intent`, `feature_flag`) get a labelled 'User metadata' strip ABOVE the SDK-provided keys (`tokens_input`, `tokens_output`, `model`). Both renderers humanise the keys (snake_case → 'Tenant id' label).

message.content: Quiet hours run 10pm–8am on weekdays and 11pm–9am on weekends.
